title: Credits
subtitle: Manage your balance and unlock features.

completeProfile.title: Complete your profile for payments
completeProfile.description: To purchase paid plans, you need to provide your phone and ID.

boostStudiesDesc: You can buy tokens on this page or earn them for free by completing 5 quizzes.
betaMessage: We're in beta, this feature will be released in version 1.0.0.

faq.title: Questions about Credits/Tokens?
faq.explanation: Credits (tokens) are used to generate personalized AI content, such as job-specific quizzes, flashcards, and interview simulations. You earn free tokens daily and by completing challenges, or you can purchase packages for intensive use.
faq.supportLink: Need help with payments? Contact support

errors.completePhoneCPF: Complete your phone and ID in your profile to make payments

confirmed.title: Payment Confirmed! 🎉
confirmed.description: Your plan has been activated successfully. Enjoy all the benefits!

notCompleted.title: Payment Not Completed
notCompleted.description: Payment was not completed. You can try again whenever you want.

pending.title: Awaiting Confirmation
pending.description: We're processing your payment. Please wait a moment...
pending.waitingConfirmation: Awaiting payment confirmation. This may take a few seconds.
pending.dataUpdated: Your data has been updated successfully.

loadingModal.title: Redirecting to payment
loadingModal.description: Please wait while we prepare your secure checkout page...
